revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Category:All_pages_needing_cleanup]]
Reverted 1 edit by [[Special:Contributions/42.118.190.225|42.118.190.225]] ([[User talk:42.118.190.225|talk]]): Unexplained removal
1 revision imported
Copying from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia2]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Articles tagged as templates and modules]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Articles tagged as templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:List of Shikinaisha]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Removing from [[Category:New]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2527 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (2528 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (22 members)
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT\:[^]]+}}" to ""
Bot: tidy & size tag (22 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "==" to " [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] "
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 22 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵↵}}↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
revision.text:
==Old Content== ==Old Content== ==Old Content== ==Old Content== {{Shortcut|CAT:CLEAN|CAT:CLEANUP}} {{Maintenance category|tracking=yes|hidden=yes}} {{polluted category}}
Here is a list of articles that need to be cleaned up. A list of these pages ordered by importance/popularity can be obtained using WMFLabs' MassViews tool here: [https://tools.wmflabs.org/massviews/?platform=all-access&agent=user&source=category&target=https%3A%2F%2Fen.wikipedia.org%2Fwiki%2FCategory%3AAll_pages_needing_cleanup&range=last-week&subjectpage=1&subcategories=1&sort=views&direction=1&view=list MassViews Analysis] (Takes a couple minutes to load due to the size of the list) Pick one and do your best. {{Random page in category}}
All pages needing cleanup {{Filter category by topic}} See also * Use of {{Tlg|Cleanup|subst=yes}} * For section cleanup, use {{Tl|Cleanup section}}. {{CatAutoTOC}} ==Categories== [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Wikipedia cleanup| ]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Wikipedia cleanup| ]] [[en:Category:All pages needing cleanup]] [[sn:All pages needing cleanup]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
revision.text:
==Old Content== ==Old Content== ==Old Content== ==Old Content== {{Shortcut|CAT:CLEAN|CAT:CLEANUP}} {{Maintenance category|tracking=yes|hidden=yes}} {{polluted category}}

All pages needing cleanup {{Filter category by topic}} See also * Use of {{Tlg|Cleanup|subst=yes}} * For section cleanup, use {{Tl|Cleanup section}}. {{CatAutoTOC}} ==Categories== [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Wikipedia cleanup| ]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Wikipedia cleanup| ]] [[en:Category:All pages needing cleanup]] [[sn:All pages needing cleanup]]

==Old Content== ==Old Content== {{Shortcut|CAT:CLEAN|CAT:CLEANUP}} {{Maintenance category|tracking=yes|hidden=yes}} {{polluted category}}
Here is a list of articles that need to be cleaned up. ==Old Content== {{Shortcut|CAT:CLEAN|CAT:CLEANUP}} {{Maintenance category|tracking=yes|hidden=yes}} {{polluted category}}
Here is a list of articles that need to be cleaned up. A list of these pages ordered by importance/popularity can be obtained using WMFLabs' MassViews tool here: [https://tools.wmflabs.org/massviews/?platform=all-access&agent=user&source=category&target=https%3A%2F%2Fen.wikipedia.org%2Fwiki%2FCategory%3AAll_pages_needing_cleanup&range=last-week&subjectpage=1&subcategories=1&sort=views&direction=1&view=list MassViews Analysis] (Takes a couple minutes to load due to the size of the list) Pick one and do your best. {{Random page in category}}

revision.text:
==Old Content== {{Shortcut|CAT:CLEAN|CAT:CLEANUP}} {{Maintenance category|tracking=yes|hidden=yes}} {{polluted category}}
Here is a list of articles that need to be cleaned up. A list of these pages ordered by importance/popularity can be obtained using WMFLabs' MassViews tool here: [https://tools.wmflabs.org/massviews/?platform=all-access&agent=user&source=category&target=https%3A%2F%2Fen.wikipedia.org%2Fwiki%2FCategory%3AAll_pages_needing_cleanup&range=last-week&subjectpage=1&subcategories=1&sort=views&direction=1&view=list MassViews Analysis] (Takes a couple minutes to load due to the size of the list) Pick one and do your best. {{Random page in category}}
All pages needing cleanup {{Filter category by topic}} See also * Use of {{Tlg|Cleanup|subst=yes}} * For section cleanup, use {{Tl|Cleanup section}}. {{CatAutoTOC}} ==Categories== [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Wikipedia cleanup| ]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Wikipedia cleanup| ]] [[en:Category:All pages needing cleanup]] [[sn:All pages needing cleanup]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6916515)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Shortcut|CAT:CLEAN|CAT:CLEANUP}}
{{Maintenance category|tracking=yes|hidden=yes}}
{{polluted category}}
{{Random page in category}}
{{Filter category by topic}}
{{Tlg|Cleanup|subst=yes}}
{{Tl|Cleanup section}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{wikidata link|Q6916515}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:All pages needing cleanup]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTAll pages needing cleanup]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=All_pages_needing_cleanup here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
